metadata.description: Official Clawvisor plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: clawvisor
plugins.description: Route actions through Clawvisor for credential vaulting, task-scoped authorization, and human approval flows. Connects to the Clawvisor cloud.

plugins.name: clawvisor-local
plugins.description: Route actions through a local Clawvisor daemon for credential vaulting, task-scoped authorization, and human approval flows. Requires a running daemon on localhost.
